description_long: This electric drill features a robust cylindrical body with a weathered yellow finish, accented by industrial markings and signs of wear. Prominent on its front is a large red button, flanked by metallic bolts and a circular gauge, suggesting heavy-duty use. A flexible black power cord extends from the lower section, while a sturdy metal ladder-like handle runs vertically along one side for secure handling or mounting. The surface is adorned with warning labels, numbers, and a few small control elements, giving it a utilitarian, almost sci-fi appearance. The drill lacks a visible bit at its tip, and its construction appears to be primarily metal with some plastic and rubberized components. The overall design is rugged, suitable for demanding urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, cylindrical yellow electric drill with a large red button, black power cord, and metal ladder handle, showing signs of heavy use and industrial markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large red button, circular gauge, and ladder handle on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the circular hatch, power cord attachment, and the absence of the red button.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the '112' marking, power cord, and the back of the ladder handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the full length of the ladder handle and additional small control elements.
